steps.t: Brychan the Bold is at his home in Ost Forod, north-east of Tinnudir. Helechír told you to return to the mainland and follow the road north of the cro…
Helechír is on a little island off of Men Erain. You taught Brychan the Bold a hard lesson, and he fled into his home. Helechír is waiting to hear the…
